column1: # This file customizes how ZAP treats specific findings for a GraphQL API
# backend. We are NOT a browser-rendered website, so several default rules
# do not apply and have been silenced below.
# Non-Storable Content — Expected for API responses (we don't want JSON to
# be cached by CDNs). Default rule assumes a static website.
# Sec-Fetch-* headers are REQUEST headers sent by browsers. ZAP scans as
# a plain HTTP client, doesn't send them, then reports them as missing.
# Cannot be fixed from server side.

column3: (Sec-Fetch-* request headers — N/A for non-browser clients)
